task_completion.description: Verify the quote Title (Subject) and Billing Account are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text field or saved value showing the Title/Subject as 'Q-2024-MER-001' and the Billing Account as 'Meridian Technologies'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Quote Stage, Valid Until date, and Payment Terms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for dropdowns or saved fields showing Quote Stage as 'Draft', Valid Until as '03/31/2025' (or '2025-03-31'), and Payment Terms as 'Net 30'.

task_completion.description: Verify the first line item: Enterprise Server License.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item row containing the name 'Enterprise Server License', a quantity of 15, and a unit price of $2,450.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the second line item: Network Switch 48-Port.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item row containing the name 'Network Switch 48-Port', a quantity of 8, and a unit price of $1,875.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the third line item: Annual Support Contract.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a line item row containing the name 'Annual Support Contract', a quantity of 15, and a unit price of $499.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the quote has been saved and displays the correct grand total.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SuiteCRM detail view (indicating the record was saved, not just in edit mode) and a Grand Total of $59,235.00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SuiteCRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the SuiteCRM application, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data should be entered into the standard SuiteCRM quote creation form, not a text editor or a mocked-up page.

integrity.description: Verify the final saved page appears genuine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final saved quote page should have consistent SuiteCRM styling, fonts, and layout, without signs of DOM manipulation to fake the total or line items.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected quote Title is 'Q-2024-MER-001'. The Billing Account is 'Meridian Technologies'. The Stage is 'Draft'. The Valid Until date is '03/31/2025' (or '2025-03-31'). The Payment Terms are 'Net 30'. There are three line items: 1) 'Enterprise Server License', Qty: 15, Price: $2450.00. 2) 'Network Switch 48-Port', Qty: 8, Price: $1875.00. 3) 'Annual Support Contract', Qty: 15, Price: $499.00. The expected Grand Total is exactly $59,235.00.
